item.title: Time for another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
your beloved child is technically now also incarcerated sir
jizz me on smackdog if you want to talk more about this
mmm hmm
used to do this often, it's delicious
NEW YORK CITY??!?
finally we get a new sin
that's unsettling
cute calico
i guess
i want to eat that vintage mcd's food and ice cream obv
Johnny Cash 1961
and why shouldn't we
well.. yes and no
cast it into the fire
bc Ozzy loves wearing tshirts that just say 'Ozzy'
both not real
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Spillage
item.description: 'Thankfully Kurosawa never actually told any of the actors exactly how much blood was going to burst out of the pipe and everyone on set assumed that a geyser of blood was supposed to explode out of the guy’s chest because Akira Kurosawa didn’t make mistakes. The production on the other hand did and assumed that Kurosawa would want to do another take because of how fucking stupid and comical the effect looked. The thing is, Kurosawa reportedly loved the effect and absolutely refused to do another take, insisting that the shot was perfect as it was.' https://screenrant.com/akira-kurosawa-sanjuro-mistake-change-action-movies-violence/
item.dc:creator: AliceWins

item.title: PSA: Saying someone from a minority group is "one of the good ones" or "not like the others" is not a compliment
item.description: And if you don't know, now you know. (The woman is Sweet Anita, a Twitch streamer and Youtuber)

item.dc:creator: Ellman91

item.title: I made Sammy a cake for his 10th birthday and he didn’t believe me it was for him
item.description: He turned 10 last May, so he’s almost 11 now! and yes he’ll get another cake he earned it! I made the cake myself, it was pumpkin and applesauce, with a peanut butter frosting. and the bone treat on top is his CBD treat for his arthritis. Once he believed me that he was allowed to eat it he went to town. he’s a goddamn 13/10 good boi. #cute #dog #doggo #great_dane
item.dc:creator: feryooday

item.title: Images of Note: It all returns to nothing.
item.description:
The weirder Garfield gets the better
oh no
:o
ConcernedApe if you are reading this, let us convince the village to burn Morris in a big wicker man during the Green Rain event.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii I WILL NOT BEAT LINUS TO DEATH!
Yamyam
OwO
Frog :)
Shane is the only sane person in the village during the green rain, even Demetrius is overreacting.
CONCERNEDAPE! LET US SACRIFICE MORRIS TO YOBA IN A BIG WICKER MAN!
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also i'm streaming come stare at me: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.title: Meme Dump 37 out of 200
item.description:
Hey imgur ~ hope you guys had a good weekend and Monday. Remember to cry and poop on corporate time ♡
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Classic covid lock down meme
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Like sleeping
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Bet you this is gonna get my post marked as "mature" ;-;
Maybe 6
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Where are they at though? ;-;
.
.
.
.
Too true lol
Thanks for joining me in another phone cleaning meme dumparoo ♡ #memes #memedump #funny #mental_health #dank_memes #remembertostayhydrated
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.title: Safety.... DANCE!
item.description: I'm really not this much of a cocky bastard, generally. This just happened to be the "Snarky" take, and the /actual/ safety concern with this saw presented itself. Either way, folks in other places thought it was funny, so I figured the refined palate of the Imgur crowd would enjoy it too. If you LOL'd, ROFL'd, or even ROFLMAOCOPTER'd, it would sure help me out if you gave the original short a watch, and bumped up my youtube metrics: https://youtube.com/shorts/GJ3E9s8ugIM?si=sG5eFvqgYUXMY1S0 Watching that one actually helps my metrics better than Imgur does. Or you can skip the line and just go right to my channel to see more of this goofy fun. https://www.youtube.com/@ICutRocks And finally... I'd sure appreciate the upvote. If you guys help me make Most Viral again, and dare I say it... front page... that would be a HUGE boost for my channel. That and most of y'all seem like nice people :D
item.dc:creator: ICutRocksOnYoutube

item.title: There's a difference between knowing the path and walking the path. :)
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1145 (seven of 9 to 5)
item.description:
Morning has come. The stars have aligned for cleaning. Let's get this bread.
Hold dromaeosaur gentle like burger.
@kaeldra
My foray of late into Proto-indo-european has given me bunches of gems like this.
@sisipherr
Earth. Earth is.
Big mood, dude.
I miss feeling like there was magic in the world everywhere. I don't feel that anymore. But I don't miss how often I was on a roller coaster of madness in those days, without good therapy, working meds, and my trauma unexplored, unmanaged, and unacknowledged. I had to destroy parts of myself I liked, back when I hated most of myself.... to make a whole, mostly functional person who I actually like now, or at least, can tolerate. So it goes. That reminds me. Take your meds.
Oh no.
Hot take: Napoleon wasn't that great of a General imo.
Yeah, can't figure out why that happened.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Don't worry. [Unintelligible]."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: I carved this from wood! The ants are carved from bloodwood, the leaf is Maple, and the base is Walnut. I made this as an ode to the aggressive and adaptable fire ant.

item.title: It’s been a very VERY bad year.
item.description: This guy’s been solid in his support but he’s got his own stuff going on. I feel REALLY bad for being a big huge support person to well… this *gestures vaguely to madamerainbowpants trembling in her bed from anxiety and ugly crying herself to sleep.

item.title: Billionaires gonna billionaire.
item.description: Billionaires are not our friends. They are the modern iteration of “Landed Aristocracy” from feudal times. We are their serfs and tenants. There’s a reason they’re called LANDLORDS. When will we revolt? https://flip.it/v3KFGj
